evidence_provenance_investigation.bounded_inference: The recurrence identifies an artifact-convention or guidance usability problem worth targeted diagnosis, but does not identify whether the task, Skill, agent behavior, or grader is the root cause.
evidence_provenance_investigation.observation: Every gradable v8 and v10 arm failed the frozen deterministic evidence-provenance grader; v9 returned no gradable artifacts.

exploratory_treatment_signal: No directional Skill signal is supported: v9 was a matched service failure; in v10 each arm passed one and failed one of the two unvalidated claim checks, while both failed evidence provenance.
limitations: Two additional attempted pairs include only one complete pair.
The rubric is internally authored and lacks independent human/expert calibration.
Pair outcomes are diagnostic exact-version observations, not a population effect estimate.
